positive: Minimalist, abstract representation of 'Growth' and 'Potential'. A stylized, geometric forest composed of interlocking pastel color gradients (sage green, blush pink, pale blue) forming abstract, delicate silhouettes of blossoming trees and ascending spirals. The central composition features a stylized mountain peak rising through a nebula-like dawn, rendered with clean, solid lines and high contrast against a soft, cream-colored sky. The style is clean vector art meets modern graphic design, utilizing negative space and strong, identifiable silhouettes. Perfect for screen printing on apparel, with a visible border/margin area for text or graphic placement.
